content.en:
"I have six materials, but I don't have the others, after all, I don't need them, so I didn't collect them!" Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Six materials!" Ye Tian was overjoyed, this was already a lot.

"Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, can you trade these six materials to me?" Ye Tian asked.

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor hesitated for a moment, and then said, "Endless Great Ancestor, what can you exchange for? Ordinary treasures are of no use to me!"

"How about the real gold?"

Ye Tian said.

"Tongtian True Gold?" Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor shook his head, "Tongtian True Gold is indeed very precious, but to us it is only currency. Moreover, I don't have a strong build-up, so I don't have much need for Tongtian Jin. "

"These!"

Ye Tian waved his hand and took out some materials, these were all resources found from the Eternal True Ruins, and they were all of some use to the Heavenly Ancestors, but they were of no use to him.

So, he sorted it out.

Now, he saw if he could exchange these resources for the six materials on Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor's body.

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor looked at these resources, nodded slightly, and said, "It is indeed of some use to me, okay, I agree to the transaction!"

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, he completed the deal with Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor.

Next, he took the initiative to contact other Heavenly Ancestors, some Heavenly Ancestors did not agree to trade, but there were still Heavenly Ancestors who agreed to trade.

In this way, he successively traded one or two materials from these Heavenly Ancestors.

In the end, he was missing only one material.

"True Dragon Realm Ruins Stone!"

There is only one place where this material is available, and that is the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

And these Heavenly Ancestors had not been to the True Dragon Realm Ruins, so they naturally couldn't get the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

The Dongao Heavenly Ancestor of Falcon Dragon City had been to the True Dragon Realm Ruins, but he couldn't contact the Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

"It would be nice if I could go to the True Dragon Realm Ruins myself!"

However, he had learned about the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and even the very powerful Heavenly Ancestor couldn't enter them, so he had to rely on the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order to enter the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"I can only think of a way slowly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

The ruins of the true dragon realm.

this day.

A rather embarrassed figure rushed out of it.

"Hahaha, it's finally out!"

The figure spoke.

If there is a familiar Heavenly Ancestor here, he will recognize his identity - Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

A long time ago, he got a piece of the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, and then he entered the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

In the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, he didn't know how many crises he encountered, and even almost fell several times.

Now that it's out, he's relieved.

Rumble!!!!

The space-time behind him distorted, and three figures came out.

These were the three Heavenly Ancestors, each of them with injuries all over their bodies, yet they rushed towards the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor in anger.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, you shameless guy, hand over the True Dragon Sudo !!!"

The three Heavenly Ancestors roared angrily.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor frowned, these guys chased and killed him in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, but they didn't expect to chase him out directly now.

"Three, whoever grabs the treasure is theirs, this is the rule of the True Dragon Realm Ruins!"

Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

One of the Heavenly Ancestors, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, said angrily: "Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, you have always been very shameless, but we didn't expect you to be so shameless. We have been fighting for a long time for the sake of the real dragon Sudo, and I don't know how many times we have been severely injured and how many life-saving things have been consumed. At the last critical moment, you killed and snatched the true dragon Sudo. Once, the two of us worked together, and that's how you did it!"

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, hand over the True Dragon Sudo and we'll leave immediately!" another Heavenly Ancestor also followed.

However, it was almost impossible to get the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor to hand over the True Dragon Sudo in his hands!

The value of the True Dragon Sudo is so high, it is simply an unimaginable treasure of great chance, which is enough to make these Heavenly Ancestors desperate!

So, it is impossible for him to hand it over.

Swish!

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was ready to escape.

Seeing this, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and the other three Heavenly Ancestors directly killed them.

Thundered!!!!

The four Heavenly Ancestors fought in this immeasurable realm ruins, and terrifying battle fluctuations swept across this area, and now there was a realm.

This realm has never given birth to a Heavenly Ancestor, and it can't protect this realm at all at this moment.

Abrupt.

An attack landed in the realm.

In an instant, the attack penetrated through the entire realm, shattering the territories in the realm, and countless creatures and Great Ancestors instantly turned into powder.

And the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestors would not deliberately avoid this realm, let alone care about the life and death of those countless beings.

It wasn't long before the realm began to fall apart in the midst of their fighting.

If this realm gives birth to a realm master, it can mobilize the origin power of the realm, which is enough to withstand the long-term attacks of several Heavenly Ancestors.

But now, the power of the Realm is too scattered, and it can only be passively endured, and naturally it can't withstand the attacks of the Heavenly Ancestors.

Rumble!!!!

The realm is completely shattered!

And these Heavenly Ancestors were still fighting, and the flesh bodies of both sides didn't know how many times they had been pierced, and the immeasurable blood flowed and scattered into the immeasurable realm ruins void, turning into a sea of blood.

Abrupt.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor used his Blood Ancient Battle Spear to shatter the head of a Heavenly Ancestor with a single blow, severely damaging it.

But the other two Heavenly Ancestors immediately surrounded and killed them, giving this Heavenly Ancestor time to heal his wounds.

After a while, the Heavenly Ancestor continued to join the battle.

I have to say that the strength of the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor is strong enough, and he still has a certain advantage in fighting against the three Heavenly Ancestors with his own strength.

If it were an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor, I am afraid that it would have been so badly injured that it would be difficult to continue fighting.

And their battle was also exposed, and many Great Ancestors and Heavenly Ancestors knew about it.

......

Universal space-time network.

Ye Tian was a little shocked when he saw that there was a Great Ancestor discussing the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor, who were fighting and fighting, and had also destroyed a territory.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor!"

He knew something about this Heavenly Ancestor, and he was the former master of the Blood Ancestor.

It's just that he didn't know where the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor had gone in the past, but now he did.

"The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor has gone to the True Dragon Realm Ruins, no wonder I haven't heard the news of the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor all this time!" Ye Tian muttered.

As for why the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor fought with the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and them, he didn't know.

But since the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor had come out of the True Dragon Realm Ruins, he was going to go over and take a look at the excitement.

With his strength, he is not afraid of being affected.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered the Infinite Realm Ruins, and then shuttled towards the place of the battle.
